primary.description: Deep Sage - Used for primary actions, buttons, active states. Signifies growth and health.

secondary.description: Bone/Clay - Used for page backgrounds, subtle panels. Reduces eye strain compared to pure white.

accent.description: Soft Bronze - Used for premium features, 'Pro' badges, and calls to upgrade.

skin_analysis.camera_frame: relative w-full max-w-md aspect-[3/4] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border-4 border-white

marketing_landing.hero: Left aligned big type, right aligned abstract skin texture

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A6C58] hover:bg-[#3D5A49] text-white font-medium px-6 py-2.5 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2F0EB] hover:bg-[#E5E2DB] text-[#4A6C58] font-medium px-6 py-2.5

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] p-6 rounded-xl hover:border-[#4A6C58]/30 transition-colors
cards.metric: bg-white border-none shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] p-6 rounded-2xl flex flex-col justify-between h-32

camera_interface.overlay: absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border-[2px] border-white/30 rounded-3xl
camera_interface.scan_line: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-1 bg-[#4A6C58] shadow-[0_0_15px_#4A6C58] animate-scan

scan_demo_face.alt: Close up face for scan demo

universal_guidelines.css_approach: Tailwind CSS for 95% of styling. Custom CSS only for complex animations (like the scan line).
universal_guidelines.state_management: Use React Context for global settings (Theme, Billing Status).
universal_guidelines.charts: Use Recharts. Style them to be minimal: hide grid lines, use thin strokes.
universal_guidelines.icons: Use Lucide React. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (Deep Sage, Bone, Soft Bronze).
3. FONTS: Import Manrope and Inter from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. LAYOUT: Create a SidebarLayout for the Merchant Dashboard and a FullScreenLayout for the Camera App.
5. COMPONENT - CAMERA: Build a custom camera component using react-webcam. Add the 'Tracing Beam' scan animation over it.
6. COMPONENT - BILLING: Create a pricing card using the 'Tracing Beam' border effect for the 'Pro' plan to make it pop.
7. PROXY: The '/pages/skin-analysis' route must be built as a standalone SPA (Single Page App) feel, embedded via App Proxy.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all form inputs have aria-labels and all colors pass WCAG AA.
